summary: A phased rollout page where visible decision points, evaluation gates, or pilot checkpoints shape how scaling proceeds.
composition_pattern: horizontal roadmap with distinct checkpoints or evaluation points breaking phase transitions
hero_position: full-width phased roadmap with visible gate moments
support_structure: optional light driver or owner note
when_to_use: Pilot success or review gates determine whether the next phase proceeds.
The page must highlight checkpoints rather than just elapsed time.
avoid_when: The rollout is straightforward and does not hinge on explicit decision points.
